title: Figure 11 in A quantitative method for collecting water mites in lotic, riffle-run habitats for water quality biomonitoring
author: Stenger, Logan R.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 11 An example of how water mites appear under a stereoscope. a – water mites of mixed taxa in a single sample ready to be sorted through and identified; b – water mites belonging to the genusTestudacarus and their easily observable characteristic dorsal plates; c – water mites belonging to the genusKongsbergia and their easily distinguishable posterior body shape.
steps_raw: Figure 11 An example of how water mites appear under a stereoscope. a – water mites of mixed taxa in a single sample ready to be sorted through and identified; b – water mites belonging to the genusTestudacarus and their easily observable characteristic dorsal plates; c – water mites belonging to the genusKongsbergia and their easily distinguishable posterior body shape.
